untranslatable_reason: Signal requires ranking all stocks by 12-month lagged returns and selecting top/bottom deciles. This is a cross-sectional portfolio construction rule that cannot be expressed as a single-stock technical indicator condition. The engine would need to: (1) compute 12-month lagged returns across the entire universe, (2) rank by percentile, and (3) filter by decile membership. These operations require universe-level aggregation and are outside the scope of single-instrument indicator logic.
translation_notes: This is a momentum/trend-following signal based on relative performance ranking (decile analysis) rather than absolute technical indicators. Standard backtest engines operating on individual securities cannot implement decile-based selection without custom portfolio construction logic. Recommend: (1) preprocessing universe returns into decile flags, or (2) using a portfolio-level backtest engine with ranking capabilities.
